questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The tapetum is a layer of cells present in the anther of a flower.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The tapetum is indeed a layer of cells present in the anther of a flower and it secretes nutrients and male gametes, making this option correct.
